La estación y sus alrededores siempre impecable.

The station and its surroundings are always spotless.

reviews.comment:
​Un lugar hermoso! Fui al YPF ACA Náutico Delta y me encantó. Todo impecable, muy higiénico y con una atención de diez. Es el punto ideal para una parada en el río por lo cuidado que está todo atención es super rápida . ¡Súper recomendable!"

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place! I went to the YPF ACA Náutico Delta and loved it. Everything was spotless, very hygienic, and the service was excellent. It's the ideal spot for a stop on the river because everything is so well-maintained and the service is super fast. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OUGJteHRTMk5rTkV4NWNsWnJjeTAxTmpZNVJuYxAB
